parameters.query:
SELECT DISTINCT u.user_id, u.email, u.monthly_income, u.credit_score
FROM users u
INNER JOIN matches m ON u.user_id = m.user_id
WHERE m.notified = FALSE
AND m.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours'
LIMIT 50;

SELECT m.match_id, m.match_score, p.product_name, p.provider, p.interest_rate, p.max_loan_amount, p.loan_term_months, p.source_url
FROM matches m
INNER JOIN loan_products p ON m.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE m.user_id = $1
AND m.notified = FALSE
ORDER BY m.match_score DESC
LIMIT 5;

parameters.functionCode:
// Build personalized email content const user = $node['Fetch Unnotified Users'].json; const matches = $input.all().map(item => item.json); // Sort by match score matches.sort((a, b) => b.match_score - a.match_score); // Build email HTML let productListHtml = ''; matches.forEach((match, index) => { const scorePercent = Math.round(match.match_score * 100); const loanAmount = match.max_loan_amount ? `$${match.max_loan_amount.toLocaleString()}` : 'Varies'; const term = match.loan_term_months ? `${match.loan_term_months} months` : 'Flexible'; productListHtml += `

${index + 1}. ${match.product_name}

Provider: ${match.provider}

Interest Rate: ${match.interest_rate}% APR

Loan Amount: Up to ${loanAmount}

Term: ${term}

Match Score: ${scorePercent}%

${match.source_url ? `

Learn More →

` : ''} `; }); const emailHtml = ` Your Loan Pre-Qualification Results

🎉 You're Pre-Qualified!

Personal Loan Opportunities Await

Great news! Based on your profile, you may be eligible for the following personal loan products:

${productListHtml}

📋 Next Steps:

  1. Review each loan product carefully
  2. Compare interest rates and terms
  3. Click "Learn More" to apply directly
  4. Lenders will perform a final review

Important: This is an automated pre-qualification based on the information provided. Final loan approval is subject to the lender's complete underwriting process.

This email was sent by the Loan Eligibility Engine

Your Income: $${user.monthly_income.toLocaleString()} | Credit Score: ${user.credit_score}
`; const plainText = ` You're Pre-Qualified for Personal Loans! Great news! Based on your profile, you may be eligible for the following personal loan products: ${matches.map((m, i) => ` ${i + 1}. ${m.product_name} by ${m.provider} Interest Rate: ${m.interest_rate}% APR Loan Amount: Up to $${m.max_loan_amount?.toLocaleString() || 'Varies'} Match Score: ${Math.round(m.match_score * 100)}% ${m.source_url ? `Learn More: ${m.source_url}` : ''} `).join('\n')} Next Steps: 1. Review each loan product carefully 2. Compare interest rates and terms 3. Visit the links to apply directly 4. Lenders will perform a final review This is an automated pre-qualification. Final approval depends on the lender's review. Your Profile: Income $${user.monthly_income.toLocaleString()}, Credit Score ${user.credit_score} `; return [{ json: { user_id: user.user_id, email: user.email, subject: `You're Pre-Qualified for ${matches.length} Personal Loan${matches.length > 1 ? 's' : ''}!`, html: emailHtml, text: plainText, match_ids: matches.map(m => m.match_id) } }];
